name: promotion_window_until
description: The explicit end of the V10 grace window when promoting a Vocabulary from open to closed. An ISO8601 date or target package version string. Required if a grace window is declared; absent means promotion takes effect immediately.

aiGuidance.purpose: Bounds the grace window after open-to-closed promotion. Until this date/version, V1 violations are warnings; after it, they are errors. No unbounded windows allowed.
